basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026. Candidates with an M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Production, Mechanical, or other suitable Engineering discipline with a valid GATE score and relevant knowledge in concrete formulation, porous materials, mass transfer, membrane preparation, membrane processes, or membrane technology are eligible to apply through Email on or before 26-07-2026. The official notificat

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/other suitable Engineering
qualification.details: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/other suitable Engineering with GATE score. Knowledge in concrete formation/formulation, porous material, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane process, and/or knowledge of membrane technology.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/other suitable Engineering with GATE score. Knowledge in concrete formation/formulation, porous material, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane process, and/or knowledge of membrane technology.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the JRF position, candidates must have completed an M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Production, Mechanical, or a similar engineering discipline, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JRF post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF position at IIT Roorkee will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview to assess their suitability.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Roorkee offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement for any information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q8. What specific knowledge is required for the JRF post besides the M.Tech degree?
faq.answer: In addition to the M.Tech degree, candidates should possess knowledge in areas such as concrete formation/formulation, porous materials, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane processes, or membrane technology.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of all necessary documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
